MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Javier Puentes, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc
Arnold Walter Evje, III, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

Rodney Rachel, defendant
Robert F. Kane, Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 2791 Sixteenth Street, #62, San Francisco, California.

Trial date is vacated.
